verdict: MANUAL MULTI-SITE SEEDING WORKS and is the right delivery strategy: slow/fizzling propagation is a non-issue for accessible foci, and the contact wave gives REAL intra-focus dose amplification (one injection clears a whole connected focus, ~54x). TWO honest limits persist and are NOT fixed by injecting more: (1) the wave cannot jump healthy gaps, so you must physically reach EACH disconnected focus — undetectable micro-metastases escape (the original reason to want self-propagation); (2) every injection site still leaks into Trop2+ normal epithelium, so safety is set by antigen SPECIFICITY, not needle count -> the tumour-exclusive (logic-gated) recognition requirement from RUNG 3 / Step-3 stands.
HARD_RULE: RUNG-1 latency NEVER multiplied by RUNG-2 clustering score.
CEILING: assumed-physics regime map, NOT efficacy; agonism is wet-lab.
